ValidationRule.description: Only Sales Ops and Sys Admin can edit an Account's Name.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED( Name ), TEXT($User.Function__c) <> 'SF Admin', TEXT($User.Function__c) <> 'Sales Ops', Account_Record_Type_Name__c <> 'Partner', NOT($Permission.Validation_Rule_Account_Name_bypass) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Only Sales Ops (or System Admin) can edit the Account Name.
